problems_encountered.description: org/list does not provide valid organization IDs (returns 'unknown'). org/invite/list requires organizationId parameter in format o-XXXXX.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - missing prerequisite organization ID from org/list
execution_notes: Tool requires valid organizationId parameter. The org/list dependency returns 'unknown' instead of actual organization IDs (format: o-XXXXX), preventing execution of this tool.
